eas_text: A civil authority has issued A CHILD ABDUCTION EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: North Carolina; at 9:32 PM on AUG 11, 2019 Effective until 12:32 AM AUG 12, 2019. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text:
THIS IS A NORTH CAROLINA AMBER ALERT FOR A CHILD ABDUCTION....THE HIGH POINT POLICE DEPARTMENT IS SEARCHING FOR LEGEND MASIR GOODWINE.  LEGEND MASIR GOODWINE IS A 1 YEAR OLD LIGHT SKIN BLACK MALE APPROXIMATELY 2 FEET 0 INCHES TALL WEIGHING 20 POUNDS.  HE HAS SHORT BLACK HAIR AND BROWN EYES.  LEGEND MASIR GOODWINE WAS LAST SEEN WEARING AN ORANGE TANK TOP WITH A NINJA TURTLE BLANKET.  THE ABDUCTOR IS UNKNOWN IS DESCRIBED AS A BLACK MALE POSSIBLY WEARING A BLUE SHIRT BLUE JEANS AND A GREY HAT.  THEY WERE LAST SEEN TRAVELING SOUTHBOUND FROM 1100 SOUTH MAIN STREET HIGH POINT CITY NORTH CAROLINA IN A GOLD ACURA TL FOUR DOOR SEDAN.  MAY HAVE FRONT END DAMAGE ON BOTH SIDES WHERE LICENSE PLATE IS.  NORTH CAROLINA REGISTRATION FES4626. IF YOU HAVE ANY INFORMATION REGARDING THIS ABDUCTION CALL HIGH POINT POLICE DEPARTMENT IMMEDIATELY AT 336-883-3224 OR CALL 911 OR STAR HP.  THIS IS AN AMBER ALERT.

ACTIVATE CMAS IN REGION 7
